title: Default Skill Trees
description: The default skill trees for Pufferfish's Skills mod.
body:
# Default Skill Trees

This data pack and mod adds default skill trees for [Pufferfish's Skills](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/puffish-skills) mod. It uses custom attributes from [Pufferfish's Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/puffish-skills) mod and thus requires it to be installed. 

It adds two skill trees that increase abilities and provide various benefits. The first is for combat and the second for mining. Points and experience are gained by respectively killing mobs and mining stone or ores.

The mod is just a data pack bundled as a mod. The reason is that most people are more familiar with installing mods that data packs.

# Versions

This data pack and mod works on all following game versions: 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.19.4, 1.20, 1.20.1, 1.20.2, 1.20.4, 1.21.1, 1.21.3, 1.21.4.

## License

This data pack and mod is licensed under the Public Domain. You can use it in mod packs, modify to your needs and share without giving a credit.
